summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has complete merge preflight proof; three PRs have concrete repair blockers, two need maintainer judgment or re-review, and linked closed/open context refs are classified without closure because close/comment actions are blocked.
